title: left shift for IP addresses not available to non-system users
poc: select * from test where a << inet '10.0.0.0/8';
key_bug_features: left shift operation on IP addresses for non-system users
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ip_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET NOT NULL, user_type VARCHAR(20) CHECK (user_type IN ('system', 'non-system')));
SELECT * FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND ip_address << inet '192.168.0.0/16';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND ip_address IS NOT NULL;
